subcodes.first_line: Upon thee be My salutations, My mercy and My loving-kindness! God willing, mayest thou be occupied with the remembrance of the True One and stand firm in His service [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: علیک سلامی و رحمتی و عنایتی انشاء الله بذکر حق مشغول باشی و بخدمتش قائم
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @service to others; to the Cause of God
